plugins.name: claude-skills
plugins.description: Collection of Claude Code skills: Exa search, DataForSEO keyword/SERP research, YouTube transcripts, Vercel logs, expo-local-build (local EAS builds + on-device/over-tunnel delivery), Notion page reader, wacli (WhatsApp CLI), johns-writing-style (John's iMessage/WhatsApp voice), mailchimp-copy-style (Mailchimp-based copy guide for app surfaces + marketing), kole-design-tips (house UI/UX design playbook for app + web surfaces), system-memory-cleanup + system-disk-cleanup (macOS), x-monitor (X/Twitter daily digest), gpt-image-gen-2 (GPT Image 2 illustrations/logos/photoreal with cost logging), and youtube-video-upload.
